item.name: Wind-up Gentleman
item.description:
If “clockwork Hildibrand” doesn't quite roll off the tongue, both “minion of enquiry” and “mammet extraordinaire” are acceptable alternatives.

Use item to acquire the wind-up gentleman minion.
item.tooltip:
I have peeled away the
foul scab of uncertainty
to reveal the truth within!
  - Hildibrand
item.specialactiondescription:
Increases ATK and DEF of all allies within range by 40. The action party is immediately withdrawn from the playing field after execution.
Duration: 20s
